title: New ‘Variant of Concern’ Fuels Global Fear of Another Virus Surge
content: Scientists do not yet know how dangerous the new Omicron variant is, but its many mutations set off alarms, lowering hopes of putting the pandemic in the past.

more_info.byline: By Richard Pérez-Peña and Jason Horowitz

en_title: New ‘Variant of Concern’ Fuels Global Fear of Another Virus Surge
en_content: Scientists do not yet know how dangerous the new Omicron variant is, but its many mutations set off alarms, lowering hopes of putting the pandemic in the past.

title: ‘Today’s Outfit Is Confidence’: Atypical TikTok Star Enchants Mexico
content: Middle-aged and scarred, a Mexican journalist is breaking the mold of social media influencers with a message of pure positivity that resonates in dark times.
en_title: ‘Today’s Outfit Is Confidence’: Atypical TikTok Star Enchants Mexico
en_content: Middle-aged and scarred, a Mexican journalist is breaking the mold of social media influencers with a message of pure positivity that resonates in dark times.

title: Coffee or Chai? At 2 Kolkata Cafes, ‘Adda’ Is What’s Really on the Menu
content: Unrestricted talk, or “adda,” is the main draw at two storied cafes that are at once museums to the city’s intellectual history — and places for debate.

title: France-U.K. Acrimony Impedes Progress on Channel Crossings

title: A Mine Disaster in Russia Highlights Safety Shortfalls in Rush to Dig Coal
content: At least 46 miners were killed in an explosion at a Siberian mine. The director of the mine has been taken into police custody, along with five other administrators.
en_title: A Mine Disaster in Russia Highlights Safety Shortfalls in Rush to Dig Coal
en_content: At least 46 miners were killed in an explosion at a Siberian mine. The director of the mine has been taken into police custody, along with five other administrators.

title: Iraqis Return From Belarus, but Some Say They Will Try Again to Reach the E.U.
content: “If I find a better and safe route, I will definitely try again,” said one of the more than 600 Iraqi migrants who came home on the government’s latest evacuation flights.

title: Fresh Violence in Darfur Adds to Sudan’s Crises

title: Undeterred by Channel’s Perils, Desperate Migrants Still Plan to Cross

title: ‘Afghan Girl’ From 1985 National Geographic Cover Takes Refuge in Italy

title: New Virus Variant Stokes Concern but Vaccines Still Likely to Work

title: After detecting the Omicron variant, South Africa feels ‘punished’ by global travel bans.
content: Hours after South African scientists announced the existence of a troublesome new variant, Britain banned travelers from southern Africa. The United States and other nations quickly followed suit.
